independent project
projects / crafting the curve

Crafting the Curve

parametric furniture design exploring structural curves in wood

An independent design project exploring structurally efficient curved forms in wood furniture. Used parametric CAD to generate and refine organic geometries, then fabricated prototypes using a combination of CNC routing and hand woodworking.

role — design & fabrication
lab — independent project
tools — woodworking, digital fabrication, parametric design
